description: Parts that appear in one source but have no physical or booked counterpart — counted but unaccounted. LLM-extractable entity. Concrete part-lineage label emitted by the discrepancy-engine (types.ts PartLabel:311-316). Inherits provenance + lineage links from ProductionPart; adds note (snapshot.ts partObject:89).

attributes.name: note
attributes.description: Why this count is considered a ghost (no matching evidence) — types.ts ProductionPart.note:352
